PortfolioItem.title: PortfolioItem
PortfolioItem.description: A design project showcase item in the studio portfolio

id.description: The unique ID of the portfolio item

imageUrl.description: Base64 or url of design cover

date.description: Creation date of project formatted YYYY-MM-DD

isFeatured.description: Whether showcase is pinned on homepage

portfolio/{id}.description: Collection of portfolio designs and case study items
